name: Qualia Round Display Demo (PID 5792)
description: Tests TL021WVC02 2.1" Round RGB TTL TFT Display (480x480) on Adafruit Qualia ESP32-S3. Responds to checkin, configures the display via RGB666 interface, then writes test messages.

steps.name: checkin-response
steps.description: Respond to device checkin with OK and board capabilities

steps.name: add-display
steps.description: Configure the RGB TTL Round display (480x480, RGB666 interface)

steps.name: write-hello
steps.description: Write a test message to the round display

write.name: qualia-round
write.message:
Hello from ProtoMQ!
Qualia Round Display
480x480 RGB TTL
PID 5792
